_note: CISA-KEV-shaped fixture. Real schema documented at https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog. Entries chosen to exercise vendor keyword matching against seeded suppliers.
title: CISA Catalog of Known Exploited Vulnerabilities

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: Honeywell Experion PKS Stack-Based Buffer Overflow
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Unauthenticated attacker can execute arbitrary code on engineering workstations connected to Experion PKS controllers.
Firmware update process does not verify signatures, allowing supply-chain insertion of unsigned avionics LSAP.

vulnerabilities.vulnerabilityName: GE Aviation Engine Diagnostic Authentication Bypass
vulnerabilities.shortDescription: Hardcoded service credentials permit remote read of engine telemetry and modification of diagnostic thresholds.
vulnerabilities.requiredAction: Rotate credentials and apply hotfix HF-2026-02.
